_comment: Time-domain measurement system configuration. All time-domain modules read from this file. See CLAUDE.md §Time-Domain Measurement System for field descriptions.

channels.name: weight_g
channels._comment: Box + litter + cat weight in grams from the scale.

channels.name: chip_id
channels._comment: Microchip / RFID reader output. String cat-ID or null when no chip detected.

channels.name: similarity
channels._comment: CLIP similarity scores against every registered cat. Expanded at runtime into per-cat keys named similarity_<catname>. CLIP runs locally; no API cost per tick.

trigger._comment: weight_entry_delta_g: minimum weight rise above pre-visit baseline (g) to declare kitty_present. weight_exit_delta_g: minimum weight drop to declare kitty_absent. chip_absent_consecutive: null chip readings in a row before declaring kitty_absent. similarity_entry_threshold: minimum CLIP score to declare kitty_present. similarity_exit_threshold: score must fall below this on all cats before declaring kitty_absent. similarity_sustained_peak_samples (P): winning cat must exceed entry_threshold for at least P consecutive samples before the ID is accepted.

_comment2: Camera images from visits are deleted after this many days.

eigen._comment: Eigendecomposition analysis config. resample_length (L): all waveforms resampled to this length. per_cat_minimum (L/2): min waveforms for per-cat model (requires Tikhonov regularization). pooled_minimum (2*L): min waveforms for pooled model (full-rank). explained_variance_threshold: cumulative eigenvalue ratio to select N signal components. anomaly_thresholds: EV above 'normal' is normal, between 'mild' and 'normal' is mild, etc.
